description_long: This handbag features a rounded rectangular shape with a soft, fabric-like exterior adorned in a vibrant geometric and floral pattern. The main body is predominantly deep blue, accented with lighter blue and green motifs that create a visually striking design. A zipper runs along the top edge, providing secure closure, and is complemented by a matching fabric wrist strap attached to one end for easy carrying. The zipper appears to be made of metal or plastic, with a fabric pull tab for convenience. The bag's surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, suggesting a durable yet flexible material. No visible brand logo or additional decorative hardware is present, keeping the design focused on the bold pattern.
description: A soft, rectangular handbag with a blue geometric and floral pattern, featuring a top zipper and a matching wrist strap. The design is bold and modern, with no visible logos or extra decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, rounded end of the handbag with the zipper running along the top.
description_view_1: Side view displays the full patterned surface, the zipper, and the attached wrist strap.
description_view_2: Opposite end view highlights the zipper and the slim profile of the bag, with the strap visible.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the continuous geometric pattern and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
attribute_strap_type: Single wrist strap, short length, non-adjustable, attached to one end of the zipper.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge, with a fabric pull tab.
attribute_pattern: Geometric and floral pattern in blue, light blue, and green tones.
